# BLUBRIC

> Clarity. Strategy. Execution. — A lean, modern advisory practice helping Indian businesses overcome growth plateaus with execution-focused strategic direction.

BLUBRIC is a premium business advisory firm based in Vadodara, Gujarat, India, founded by Shaurya Nandecha. We deliver diagnostic-first consulting, growth strategy planning, competitor analysis, market research, AI workshops, and ongoing advisory support — specifically tailored for the Indian business ecosystem.

## Core Services

- [Business Audits & Diagnostics](https://blubric.com/services/business-audits): Comprehensive operational evaluations to catch inefficiencies and unlock hidden revenue vectors.
- [Growth Strategy Planning](https://blubric.com/services/growth-strategy): Data-driven, phased roadmaps to scale output, market share, and profitability.
- [Market Research](https://blubric.com/services/market-research): Granular intelligence on demographics, sector trends, and untapped market segments.
- [Competitor Analysis](https://blubric.com/services/competitor-analysis): Strategic competitive intelligence — SWOT benchmarking, pricing analysis, and positioning.
- [Advisory Support](https://blubric.com/services/advisory-support): Ongoing mentorship, execution tracking, and real-time decision support as an extension of your team.
- [Group AI Workshops](https://blubric.com/services/ai-workshops): Hands-on sessions to implement AI tools and automation for business efficiency.
- [Self-Assessment Reports](https://blubric.com/services/self-assessment): Custom KPI dashboards and scorecard frameworks for continuous performance tracking.

## Key Differentiators

- **Diagnostic-First Approach**: Solutions prescribed only after deep understanding of unique bottlenecks.
- **Indian Business Aligned**: Strategies grounded in the practical realities of operating in India.
- **Execution Focused**: Actionable steps and systems, not theoretical decks — backed by founder-led credibility.

## Proven Impact

- 250+ Companies Scaled across sectors — startups to established family businesses.
- 35% Average Profit Growth within 90 days of engagement.
- ₹50 Cr+ Revenue Generated for clients through strategic execution.
- 98% Client Retention Rate.

## Engagement Process

1. Initial Diagnostic & Business Audit
2. Market & Competitor Analysis
3. Strategic Roadmap Creation
4. Implementation & System Setup
5. Ongoing Advisory & Iteration

## Ideal Clients

Indian business owners facing growth plateaus, early-stage founders seeking direction, and established businesses aiming to scale — in Retail, F&B, Consumer Brands, Services, Education, and Manufacturing.
